rationale: The proposed change modifies a property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Elec. Code §253.004 governs political expenditures and has no bearing on homestead exemptions or property tax valuation.
quote: A person may not knowingly make or authorize a political expenditure in violation of this chapter.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and election code political expenditure prohibition.
